tips_en: I recommend starting with MolmoAct2, as its fully open-source vision-language-action models and real-world robotic benchmarks offer immediately actionable insights for embodied AI practitioners. CoPD complements this by proposing a general co-evolutionary training framework that could consolidate the diverse skills needed for such robotic systems, while ESamp provides a lightweight, domain-agnostic test-time decoding method to enhance reasoning diversity in any large model. Together, they trace a pipeline from specialized training through capability consolidation to efficient semantic exploration at inference.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 MolmoAct2，因为它提供了完全开源的视觉-语言-动作模型和真实机器人基准，对具身智能研究具有直接的实践价值。CoPD 通过双向互蒸馏的协同进化训练框架，为整合此类机器人系统所需的多种能力提供了通用方法；而 ESamp 则是一种轻量级的测试时解码策略，可提升任何大模型的推理多样性。这三篇论文从专项训练、能力融合到高效推理，形成了一条互补的技术链条。
